candidates.why: Primary revenue line; matches total revenue figures and is the clearest top-line label. Should be used as first-priority REVT source.
Explicit total revenue line duplicating 'Revenues' values; kept as second-priority in case of label changes over time.
Depreciation within cost of sales, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Represents cost of goods sold, not revenue; inappropriate for REVT.
Balance sheet liability, not the income statement revenue line; not suitable for REVT.

variables.notes: Both 'Revenues' and 'Total Revenue' carry identical values; 'Revenues' is chosen as primary per guidance to treat REVT as a single line that may change label over time.

candidates.why: Main COGS line aggregating direct production costs; best semantic match for COGS.
Minor adjustment line to COGS; not the primary COGS measure; can be excluded as a component because a clear main COGS line exists.
Duplicate/alias of 'Cost of goods sold' with same numbers; kept as secondary label in case of naming changes.

candidates.row_label: Drilling equipment, spare parts and consumables
candidates.why: Inventory-related asset, not period COGS expense.
Depreciation component of COGS, not the full COGS measure we want.
Balancing item, not an economic COGS figure; should be avoided per instructions.

variables.notes: Using the explicit main COGS row, with its duplicate alias as backup; not summing components.

candidates.why: Net other operating items; likely includes overhead-type costs and minor operating income. Included as an SG&A-related bucket since there is no single explicit SG&A total and it’s part of operating overhead.
Classic SG&A overhead category; clearly belongs in SG&A components.
Operating overhead not in COGS; appropriate SG&A component.
Additional admin overhead bucket; also part of SG&A.

variables.notes: Multiple SG&A-related overhead lines exist but no explicit single SG&A total; therefore multiple component rows are selected per instructions.

candidates.why: Non-current asset related to development properties, not a period R&D expense; does not represent R&D expense line.

variables.notes: No explicit R&D expense line is present in the provided candidates; per instructions, XRD is set to [] when it truly does not exist.

candidates.why: Explicit interest expense line but appears unpopulated in preview; still valid historically and conceptually the correct item.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Net interest expense after capitalized portion; best economic measure of interest expense where populated, so should be primary.
Capitalized interest, not period expense; should not be used as XINT.
Likely share of associates’ results, not interest expense.
Represents non-controlling interest share of profit, unrelated to interest expense.
Liability stock, not an interest expense flow; not suitable as XINT except as a last-resort proxy, which is not needed given proper expense lines.
Balance sheet accrual of interest expense; can serve as a backup indicator if P&L lines are missing for some years.
Total interest-bearing debt balance, not expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Per priority rule, use the net-of-capitalized interest expense first; fall back to the gross interest expense label, then to the accrued interest expense on the balance sheet if needed.

candidates.why: Represents total shareholders’ equity; equal in value to 'Total Equity' and is a valid book equity measure.
Component/reserve within equity, not total equity; unsuitable as BE on its own.
Explicit total equity line; same values as 'Shareholders equity' and the clearest aggregate book equity measure.
Combines equity and minority interest; would overstate equity attributable to shareholders if used as BE; keep only as a distant fallback, if at all.
Technical balancing item, not an economic equity figure.

variables.notes: Both Total Equity and Shareholders equity represent the same aggregate; Total Equity is used as primary with Shareholders equity as backup label.

candidates.why: Share of results from associates, not minority interest in consolidated subsidiaries; not ideal for MIB.
Explicit minority interest line, even though values are nan in the preview; semantically correct for MIB.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Represents comprehensive income before allocating to minorities; not itself the minority interest amount.
Combined total of equity plus minority interest; does not isolate the minority interest component needed.

variables.notes: Using the explicit 'Minority Interest' income-statement line as the MIB source, regardless of missing values in the preview, per instructions that presence in the sheet implies values in at least one year.
